content.en:
Reincarnation of the Origin!

Ye Tian understood.

The first path in the land of eternity is to imitate the reincarnation of the celestial race, and the second path should be to imitate the reincarnation source clan, and the reincarnation source clan breaks through one realm after another by continuously growing the reincarnation origin.

As for the third way, it should be an imitation of another racial force.

In Yazu's introduction, Ye Tian learned that the reincarnation fruit world was very close to the reincarnation source domain, so both sides occupied the treasure land of the reincarnation fruit world, and they were unwilling to let go.

Therefore, every time the reincarnation fruit realm is opened, not only the reincarnation celestial clan will send people in, but the reincarnation source clan will also send clansmen in, and the two sides will fight each other in the reincarnation fruit realm.

Not only that, but the samsaric fruit realm itself is also dangerous.

Therefore, the reincarnation celestial clan whose strength is not good will not have a very high survival rate when entering the reincarnation fruit realm.

Every time, many reincarnation celestial clans have fallen in the reincarnation fruit realm, but they must also send their clansmen in.

After all, the resources of the Reincarnation Fruit Realm are too abundant, and there are still some resources that the Reincarnation Celestial Clan needs, which are only available in the Reincarnation Fruit Realm.

"Ao Chen, there are still hundreds of thousands of primeval era years before the reincarnation fruit realm will open, and there is no need to be too anxious at the moment. Yazu said: "The Reincarnation Fruit Realm only allows the Overlord of the Origin Upper Realm who has awakened five times to enter. You can fight beyond the level yourself, and awaken the supreme power of reincarnation, we will give you some hole cards to save your life, even if you encounter the top five awakening reincarnation source clans, you can also save your life. "

Subsequently.

Yazu took out a golden leaf, which was covered with special reincarnation golden patterns.

This is a reincarnation treasure, and it is a special kind of reincarnation treasure.

Yazu introduced: "This is the reincarnation treasure - the reincarnation golden glass leaf, its function is to form the golden glass light, protect your safety, and use your cultivation to urge this reincarnation treasure, even the seven awakenings of the reincarnation source clan can not break it, you can hold on for a period of time." "

"Good stuff!"

Ye Tian was overjoyed.

With such a special reincarnation arcana, the difficulty of refining is many times more difficult than the reincarnation arcanaphic spear he refined.

"Yazu, how did this reincarnation treasure come true?" Ye Tian was curious.

Yazu introduced: "The refining method of the reincarnation golden glass leaf is to integrate a reincarnation supreme divine power into the reincarnation treasure that is about to take shape, and it cannot be done without the strength of the Origin Upper Realm Overlord of the Nine Awakenings. "

"I see!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

It seems that he doesn't want to refine such a special type of reincarnation treasure in a short period of time.

In addition to this reincarnation golden glass leaf, Yazu also gave a treasure.

I saw that Yazu took out a broken shuttle.

"This is the mutilated Reincarnation Supreme Treasure Reincarnation Golden Shuttle, although it is broken, it can still be used a few times, you can use it to escape quickly, and it can be regarded as a very good life-saving thing!" Yazu said.

"Thank you, Lord Azu!"

Ye Tian thanked.

At this time, he had to admire the heritage of the Reincarnation Heavenly Clan, and he could casually take out two reincarnation treasures, which could also be used to give them away.

In other words, it is the land of eternity, and the nine overlord-level forces are united, and there is no such arrogance, and even those seventh-time or even eight-time Origin Upper Realm overlords themselves may not have reincarnation treasures.

......

After Yazu gave him these two treasures, he asked him to go back to refining and wait for the reincarnation fruit realm to open.

Time passes.

One by one, the primeval epochs passed.

Ye Tian's strength is also improving rapidly, but this Ao Chen's copy body is still very far from the fourth balance.

Before you know it, hundreds of thousands of primeval years have passed.

this day.

Ye Tian received a summons from Yazu to take him to the Reincarnation Fruit Realm.

Ye Tian came to Yazu's palace, in addition to him, there were several members of the Reincarnation Heavenly Clan who had awakened five times, their status should not be ordinary, and their strength was definitely very strong, otherwise they would not dare to enter the Reincarnation Fruit Realm.

Yazu took several members of the Reincarnation Celestial Clan directly to the Reincarnation Fruit Realm, and on the way, he also met other members of the Reincarnation Celestial Clan.

This time, there are quite a few people from the Reincarnation Heavenly Clan who want to enter the Reincarnation Fruit Realm.

"They're going to go in too!"

Ye Tian saw two familiar figures.

Blood howl!

Swallow Xi!

These two are still awakened five times, and they still haven't stepped into the realm of six awakenings, so they can also enter the realm of reincarnation.

However, the aura on their bodies seemed to be a little stronger than the last time, and they were almost one step away from the sixth awakening.

But for Ye Tian now, these two members of the Reincarnation Heavenly Clan are relatively weak, and he can kill them at will.

And Swallowing Xi and Blood Howl also saw Ye Tian, and they all showed envious looks.

"I didn't expect that the waste of the Reincarnation Heavenly Clan, Ao Chen, has now been valued by Yazu!!!

Blood Howl was a little jealous and puzzled.

Now, among the high-level of the Reincarnation Heavenly Clan, except for those reincarnation Heavenly Clans who have awakened eight times and awakened nine times, the other reincarnation Heavenly Clans do not know that Ao Chen has mastered the supreme divine power of reincarnation, and this news has not spread, but has been blocked by the high-level of the Reincarnation Heavenly Clan.

After all, the fewer people who know about the clan, the safer, in case the news is completely leaked, and the reincarnation source clan sends a strong man to assassinate Ao Chen, so that Ao Chen falls and dies, then the reincarnation celestial clan will suffer heavy losses.

So, try to hide this news as much as possible before Aochen grows up.

Of course.

Even if many reincarnation celestial clans are stupid, they know that Aochen is not simple.

However, none of them expected that the so-called Ao Chen was just a copy of the body of an Origin Upper Realm Overlord in the Land of Eternity, and not a true reincarnation celestial clan.

If they knew this secret, they would definitely kill Ye Tian at all costs!

Over time.

More and more members of the Five Awakening Reincarnation Celestial Clan have come here, and the Reincarnation Celestial Clan has also sent several Nine Awakened Reincarnation Celestial Clans to guard against the strong men of the Reincarnation Source Clan.

Rumble!!!!!

The void in the distance distorted, and white figures emerged, which were the powerhouses of the Reincarnation Source Clan.

This time, the powerhouses of the Reincarnation Source Clan also sent several Origin Upper Realm Overlords who had awakened nine times, and their combat effectiveness was not bad at all.

Of course, they didn't really go to war, and the consequences were too serious.

The powerhouses of the Reincarnation Heavenly Clan and the Reincarnation Source Clan stood in two areas respectively, and they did not have any contact, just silently waiting for the opening of the Reincarnation Fruit Realm.

A little more passed.

The reincarnation fruit world has finally opened!

Rumble!!!!!

The huge projection of the reincarnation fruit world appeared, forming a huge whirlpool, and the whirlpool was the entrance to the reincarnation fruit world.
